body:
Mercedes Sprinter Tipper The Mercedes Sprinter Tipper packs an impressive kg payload capacity with a load space that measures mm long and mm wide. Mercedes’s legendary Sprinter…

ity with a load space that measures mm long and mm wide. Mercedes’s legendary Sprinter chassis serves as the foundation, combining high-strength steel construction and advanced safety features like Active Brake Assist.

Business owners can lease this versatile tipper at £605.89 per month. The vehicle’s sophisticated MBUX system comes with a-inch touchscreen, and its Silver NCAP Safety Rating shows Mercedes-Benz’s dedication to safety. You can choose between manual or automatic transmission, and the Sprinter Tipper will handle your toughest commercial jobs reliably.

## What Is the Mercedes Sprinter Tipper and Who Is It For?

The Mercedes Sprinter Tipper combines durability with practical functionality on its award-winning Mercedes chassis. A hydraulic mechanism tilts the rear flatbed to unload materials quickly. The high-strength steel structure makes it a reliable platform that stands up to demanding work environments.

The loadbox packs impressive dimensions –mm tomm in length and aboutmm in width. Its design focuses on efficiency withmm high sides and a loadbox that sitsmm from the ground. The vehicle’s payload capacity ranges fromkg tokg, which lets you move large quantities of materials easily.

Mid-2020 brought new engine options to this commercial powerhouse. You can pick from.0-litre turbodiesel engines that deliver betweenhp andhp, with torque ranging from Nm to Nm. The vehicle comes in front-wheel, rear-wheel, and four-wheel drive variants to match your specific needs.

Construction firms, garden services, waste management companies, landscaping businesses, and building contractors rely on the Sprinter Tipper’s capabilities. The hydraulic tipping system works great with loose materials like soil, gravel, aggregates, or construction debris.

The Sprinter Tipper beats many competitors with its superior suspension and driver comfort. The cab gives you plenty of secure storage space for tools and equipment – something tradespeople value when moving between sites. The MBUX infotainment system with a-inch touchscreen makes the driving experience even better.

This Mercedes vehicle gives businesses a versatile, reliable solution for heavy-duty material transport and unloading. It delivers performance, practicality, and Mercedes-Benz’s renowned quality standards.

## Key Features and Real-World Benefits Mercedes Sprinter Tipper

The Mercedes Sprinter Tipper showcases meticulous engineering that combines driver comfort with superior build quality in a practical design. The strong load area works well to transport and unload materials of all types.

You can unload materials without effort thanks to the tipper’s hydraulic system. This cuts down time and labour needed for disposal. Businesses in construction, landscaping, and waste management see improved productivity as a result.

Power isn’t lacking under the hood. The Sprinter Tipper delivers engine outputs fromhp tohp and torque betweenNm toNm. These numbers give you plenty of muscle for tough worksites, particularly when hauling heavy loads up to,500kg maximum gross vehicle weight.

The Sprinter puts safety first with its detailed assistance systems. The vehicle has Crosswind Assist, Attention Assist, and Mercedes-Benz’s emergency call system. The smart Active Brake Assist spots potential collisions with vehicles, pedestrians, and cyclists, then applies emergency braking if needed.

The cab combines practicality and comfort with secure storage space for tools and equipment. A multifunction steering wheel puts all controls within reach for safer operation. You also get convenient features like keyless start and an electric parking brake.

Optional reversing cameras make parking and positioning easier in tight spaces, with a° view available. These visual tools are a great way to get around construction sites or busy urban areas.

The composite rear springs add another smart engineering feature that boosts payload capacity by.5kg. The Sprinter Tipper can tow betweent to.5t depending on setup, giving businesses flexibility to move extra equipment.

This workhorse stays connected while getting the job done. It has Bluetooth integration, wifi hotspot capability, and digital services that keep your business linked on the go.

## Mercedes Sprinter Tipper Lease and Finance Options

You don’t need to buy a Mercedes Sprinter Tipper outright. Mercedes-Benz Financial Services provides three main options that suit different business needs: Finance Lease, Contract Hire, and Hire Purchase. These plans start from £429 + VAT monthly, based on current market rates.

Business owners can choose contract lengths between to months. The initial rental options are flexible at,,,, or months. Your monthly payments depend on the model and specs you pick. The Sprintercdi L2 Diesel RWD.5t Progressive Tipper costs £605.89 + VAT for businesses and £727.07 including VAT for personal use. The Sprintercdi’s automatic transmission (9G-Tronic) version costs about £650.23 + VAT per month.

Finance leasing offers clear benefits to commercial users. Businesses can keep their cash reserves for other investments since there’s no big upfront payment. The monthly lease payments also count as business expenses against profits. When your contract ends, you can choose to renew with a small “peppercorn” rental, sell to someone else and get% of the sale price, or let the company sell it for you.

Standard financing works differently with fixed rates and regular payments that make costs easy to plan. This option comes without mileage restrictions, unlike leasing. Three-way financing gives you more choices at the contract’s end – buy the vehicle, finance the final payment, or return it.

Mercedes Sprinter Tipper lease packages come with free delivery across UK mainland and the manufacturer’s warranty. You can add maintenance packages to your monthly payments. These service add-ons protect your vehicle’s value and help you plan better by combining all costs into one rate.

Your choice between leasing and buying should match your vehicle needs, tax situation, and available funds.

## Conclusion Mercedes Sprinter Tipper

I’ve spent a good amount of time with the Mercedes Sprinter Tipper, and it’s a great solution for businesses that need reliable material transport and quick unloading. Construction firms, landscaping businesses, and waste management companies will find its payload capacity and load dimensions perfect for their needs.

This vehicle really shows its worth in day-to-day operations. The solid construction gives you peace of mind, and features like Active Brake Assist and Crosswind Assist make it safer to handle in tough worksite conditions. The engine options range fromhp tohp, giving you enough power to tackle any commercial job.

The Sprinter Tipper’s price point makes it accessible to many businesses. Business leasing starts at £605.89 per month, and you get flexible financing options that work for companies of any size. The complete warranty coverage and optional maintenance packages are a great way to get more value from your investment.

The Mercedes Sprinter Tipper costs more than some other options out there. But its superior build quality, advanced tech features, and proven reliability make it worth every penny. My experience shows it’s a smart investment for businesses looking for a dependable, versatile commercial vehicle that will last for years.

## FAQs Mercedes Sprinter Tipper

**Q1. What is the payload capacity of the Mercedes Sprinter Tipper?** The Mercedes Sprinter Tipper offers an impressive payload capacity ranging fromkg tokg, making it suitable for transporting significant quantities of materials.

**Q2. What engine options are available for the Mercedes Sprinter Tipper?** The Sprinter Tipper comes with.0-litre turbodiesel engines producing betweenhp andhp, with torque outputs from Nm to Nm. These engines were introduced in mid-2020.

**Q3. What safety features does the Mercedes Sprinter Tipper include?** The vehicle is equipped with advanced safety features including Active Brake Assist, Crosswind Assist, Attention Assist, and Mercedes-Benz’s emergency call system. It also has a Silver NCAP Safety Rating.

**Q4. What are the lease options available for the Mercedes Sprinter Tipper?** Business lease options for the Mercedes Sprinter Tipper start from £605.89 per month (excluding VAT). Various financing solutions are available, including Finance Lease, Contract Hire, and Hire Purchase, with contract lengths typically ranging from to months.

**Q5. What industries can benefit from using the Mercedes Sprinter Tipper?** The Mercedes Sprinter Tipper is particularly beneficial for industries such as construction, landscaping, waste management, and building contractors where efficient material transport and unloading are essential.
